testcase.name: Simple text should NOT be identified as a link
URL ending with a space should be identified as a link
Text starting with dot before valid domain should NOT be identified as a link
URL with COM tld and www prefix should be identified as a link
Text starting with punctuation before valid tld should NOT be identified as a link
URL with unknown TLD should NOT be identified as a link
URL with NET tld without protocol should be identified as a link
URL with NOW tld should be identified as a link
URL with path and NOW tld should be identified as a link
Text starting with dash before valid domain should NOT be identified as a link
URL with uppercase characters should be identified as a link
URL with NO tld should be identified as a link
String containing a plus sign should NOT be identified as a link by current isCompleteLink logic
Text with a dot but not a valid TLD should NOT be identified as a link
URL with multiple subdomains should be identified as a link
URL with COM tld should be identified as a link
